Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8009 "FREDDYHARDEST-PART2-8009" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Freddy Hardest (Part 2).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Changed the BNE instruction at $0BCB to BEQ to remove the access code protection.
